tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 36d3d8f8-21e2-51f1-e54f-7fcee4961af8
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "Allow-HTTP-HTTPS-DNS"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Whitelist"
        set uuid e5c38e4c-21e9-51f1-4c31-fd2335d2da81
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "Allow-HTTP-HTTPS-DNS" "TCP-8443"
        set nat enable
next
    edit 3
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Deny-Other"
        set uuid eb515542-21e9-51f1-6a7d-c00364f538e8
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
